generator_used: OpenAI built-in image_gen with source-backed official IKEA product references
source_method: OpenAI built-in image_gen used the current official IKEA TIMMERFLOTTE packshot as the authoritative hardware reference and an official IKEA lifestyle photograph as the residential scale and placement reference.
post_processing: Centered crop only with ImageMagick 6, from the built-in 1536x1024 output to the published 1536x960 image. No local renderer, Pillow generator, or deterministic fallback was used.
